name: Peggy and Bruce's Baked Chicken Breast Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all seasonings. Cut vegetables into large chunks.
2. Place chicken breasts in a casserole dish. Surround with vegetable chunks.
Brush olive oil generously on all poultry and vegetables.
3. Sprinkle spices on chicken only. Bake covered in a 350°F oven for approximately 1 hour.
Uncover and continue to bake until vegetables are crispy and the potatoes/chicken are browned.
For a spicy variation, add a dash of Worcestershire sauce and/or Tabasco over the dish before baking.
